tests.name: Login -> Checkout (chained integration) renders the checkout page heading
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) uses the token issued by login() to authorize the checkout request
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) sends no Authorization header when checkout happens without a prior login
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) shows the success screen after a completed checkout
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) resets the loading state and re-enables the button after a failed checkout
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) shows no coupon error banner before any coupon has been applied
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) clears the Authorization default header once logout() runs after a login()
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) restores the logged-in user from an existing session token on mount
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) applies a coupon and uses its final_amount (not the raw cart total) at checkout, recording usage
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) falls back to the generic coupon error message on a bare network error (no response object)
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) falls back to err.message on a bare checkout network error (no response object)
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) shows the coupon error message and does not touch the total when the coupon is rejected
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) shows the exact idle label "Áp dụng" on the coupon button before any click
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) does NOT record coupon-usage when a coupon was applied but the user is not logged in (coupon_id present, token missing)
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) renders each cart line with its price * quantity subtotal
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) disables the "Áp dụng" button while the coupon code input is empty and enables it once typed
Login -> Checkout (chained integration) shows the transient "..." / "Đang xử lý..." labels while the coupon/checkout requests are in flight
